title: Grilled Italian Chicken and Corn Cakes
description: A flavorful and crispy chicken and corn cake dish, grilled to perfection with a tangy twist. This recipe is perfect for a tasty and satisfying meal.
instructions: In a large bowl, combine chicken, masarepa, corn kernels, flaky sea salt, and tangy Italian seasoning.
Mix well with your hands until just combined.
Form into 4-6 patties, depending on desired size.
Brush grill oil onto the grill grates.
Grill the patties for 5-7 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
Transfer the patties to a plate and let rest for 2-3 minutes.
Garnish with chopped parsley and serve immediately.
